login.tagline: Log your lifts. Smash your PRs.
login.registerTagline: Create your account to start tracking.
login.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Log In
login.registerSuccess: Registration successful! A confirmation email has been sent. You can now log in.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.passwordWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, numbers, and symbols.
errors.dobInvalid: Invalid Date of Birth (must be at least 13 years old).
errors.userNotFound: No account found associated with this email address.
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

errors.atLeastOneMetric: Please add at least one value (Weight, Reps, or Time).
errors.failedToAdd: Failed to add record. Please try again.
errors.futureDate: You cannot log workouts in the future.

percentageCalculator.title: RM Percentage Calculator
percentageCalculator.noPBs: Log a 'Weight' personal best to use this feature.
percentageCalculator.lessThanBarbell: Weight is less than or equal to the barbell.

shareAndInfo.infoText: For an app-like experience, install BULLBOX on your device! Look for the 'Add to Home Screen' or 'Install' option in your browser menu.

dashboard.aiCoachDescription: I analyze your progress and give you personalized advice to optimize your training. Complete a session to receive feedback.

common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

personalBests.title: Personal Bests
personalBests.noPBsDescription: Every record starts somewhere. Log your first session today and start your journey to greatness.

workoutHistory.title: Workout History
workoutHistory.noRecords: No records found. Add a workout to get started!
workoutHistory.logTwoRecords: Log at least two records for this exercise to see a progress chart.

history.noInsights: No significant insights detected for this period.

modals.loadingAnalysis: Coach Coach is analyzing your performance...

errors.allFieldsRequired: Title, date, and time are required.

modals.resetPasswordPrompt: Enter your email and we'll send a link to get back into your account.
modals.resetSubmitted: If an account with that email exists, we've sent a password reset link.
modals.checkSpam: If you don't receive the email in a few minutes, please check your junk or spam folder.
modals.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the exercise '{exercise}'? You will not be able to select it for future workouts.

aiAssistant.title: AI Coach Settings
aiAssistant.webGpuNotSupported: WebGPU not supported on this device

download.notice: The first time will download ~1.5GB of data.
download.preparing: Starting background download for offline use...

aiAssistant.webGpuRequirement: Offline processing requires WebGPU compatible hardware.
aiAssistant.firstTimeOnly: This will only happen the first time.

feedback.modalDescription: Have an idea to improve BULLBOX? Found a bug? Let us know so we can keep building the best tool for your PRs.
feedback.placeholder: Tell Coach Bull what's on your mind...
feedback.successMessage: Your feedback has been sent successfully. Thanks for helping us improve!
feedback.errorSending: Failed to send feedback. Please try again.
feedback.pageSubtitle: Help us evolve Bullbox. Your ideas are the engine of our training.

features.title: New Features
features.desc: What tool are you missing to smash your records?

bugs.title: Bugs / Errors
bugs.desc: If something isn't working right, tell us where and when it happened.

ux.title: UX Improvements
ux.desc: Is any part of the app feeling slow or difficult to use?
